steps.title: Account for the first two classes
steps.content: The first class is free, and the second class is half of 26.40 dollars, which is 13.20 dollars. For $x\gt 2$, the remaining $x-2$ classes cost 26.40 dollars each.

steps.title: Write the total cost
steps.content: The total cost is the fixed 13.20 dollars for the first two classes plus 26.40 dollars for each remaining class: $$f(x)=26.40(x-2)+13.20$$
